healthReason: Budget exhaustion P1 (auto-resolves April 1). QA agents broken P1 (auto-resolves April 1). Kernel #1306 default-deny UNASSIGNED — 7th consecutive cycle. Conference 38 days out with 3 unowned P0s (#228, #233, capture funnel). 8 new fundraise+marketing issues require human action.
summary: Strong cycle: 2 PRs merged (critical SKILL.md fix + 6-driver docs), senior agent completed README CTA funnel (workspace#234, PR #1388 open). Sprint wizard goal confirmed DONE. New 8-issue fundraise/marketing cluster (#240-247) filed — all require human-driven execution. Kernel #1306 default-deny enters 7th consecutive unassigned cycle — conference demo blocks on this.

actionsThisCycle.detail: fix(studio-qa): SKILL.md created for octi-pulpo-em, octi-pulpo-sr, octi-pulpo-qa, ecosystem-scout. Critical: prevented silent-failure for 4 agents at next scheduled run. All 135 enabled agents now have SKILL.md coverage.
docs(planning): multi-driver narrative updated 5 → 6 drivers (Goose confirmed). Closes #230 (partial — workspace strategy doc already updated; site stats update still needed in agent-guard repo).

Senior agent (copilot-cli:sonnet:studio:senior) completed README capture funnel CTA: GitHub stars badge, renamed Quick Start → Get Started, cloud+Discussions CTAs, updated badge copy. PR #1388 open in agentguard repo.
agentguard init studio interactive wizard shipped via kernel commits 80b69f9 + 7a98c4d (13 tests). Sprint goal now 4/5 done; Runner/Cloud protocol blocked on #1306 + cloud Phase 2A.
5 issues: #240 (DPP→paid conversion), #241 (pitch deck), #242 (seed fund targets), #243 (conference investor prep), #244 (5-week countdown). Human-only work — no agent assignment. Escalated.

3 issues: #245 (YouTube demo video '139 agents, 1 human'), #246 (conference abstracts — RSA, AI Engineer Summit, KubeCon), #247 (LinkedIn content calendar). Routing to marketing-em; human must provide founder narratives.
Script reports healthy. Telemetry pipeline healthy (event 1.3h ago). 0 cron collisions. All agents have SKILL.md coverage after #248 merge.
Kernel=yellow (#1316 Go binaries, #1306 default-deny). Marketing=green. HQ=yellow. Site=yellow. Cloud/QA/Octi-Pulpo/Design have no EM reports yet.
10 open issues in agentguard-analytics. Conference-critical: #39 quota metrics, #38 telemetry snapshot, #36 evidence pack (Apr 30 deadline). No new requests from studio this cycle.
